summary: iOS 🟥 ANC | Settings for Transparency mode are not properly applied/saved
scenario: Transparency mode sub-settings (Environment/Speech) revert to defaults instead of saving user selection when switching between them.
description_clean: Transparency mode settings (Environment/Speech) are not properly applied or saved. When switching between Environment and Speech sub-settings for Transparency mode, the device reverts to a default (Surround 85 reverts to Speech; Free 60 and Free 20 revert to Environment) instead of saving the user's selection.
expected: The device should save and retain the user's selected sub-setting for Transparency mode (e.g., if user selects Speech, it should stay on Speech; if user selects Environment, it should stay on Environment).
actual: The device reverts to a default sub-setting: Surround 85 reverts to Speech; Free 60 and Free 20 revert to Environment.
